kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09A. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09A" and put them into a temporary table called J09A_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09A_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09A_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09A" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp; CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT d.*, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09A%';

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT d.*, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT
UPDATE J09A_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT e."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg e WHERE e.Installation = J09A_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT

UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.TITLE FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.TITLE FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET FORENAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.FORENAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.FORENAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET SURNAME = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.SURNAME FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.SURNAME FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET STREET = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.STREET FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.STREET FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET STREETNO = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.STREETNO FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.STREETNO FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET EMAIL = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.EMAIL FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.EMAIL FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN POST_CODE1_CONTACT INTEGER
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN CITY1_CONTACT TEXT
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN CITY2_CONTACT TEXT

UPDATE J09A_temp SET POST_CODE1_CONTACT = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET CITY1_CONTACT = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.CITY1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.CITY1 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET CITY2_CONTACT = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR) THEN (SELECT s.CITY2 FROM sales_master s WHERE s.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) ELSE (SELECT n.CITY2 FROM net_master n WHERE n.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2)

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_CONTACT AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_CONTACT AS CITY1, CITY2_CONTACT AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09A mandatory reading file for equipment classified as MANDATORY_READING.

args.sqlite_command: UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2) AND ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_CONTACT AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_CONTACT AS CITY1, CITY2_CONTACT AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_CONTACT AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_CONTACT AS CITY1, CITY2_CONTACT AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the processed J09A meter readings file excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL classifications.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE J09A_temp
